title: Store Settings
description: Manage core store configurations, payments, shipping, and advanced options.

general.title: Store Identity
general.desc: Update basic store information and branding.
general.logoDesc: Appears on invoices, emails, and the frontend.
general.faviconDesc: The icon that appears in the browser tab (32x32px).

region.title: Region & Language
region.desc: Set your default currency and timezone.
region.currencyDesc: This currency will be used for all financial calculations.

seo.title: Search Engine Optimization
seo.desc: Optimize your store's visibility in search results.
seo.analyticsDesc: Track visitors and sales using your tracking ID.

social.title: Social Media Links
social.desc: Link your store to your social media accounts.

contact.title: Official Contact Details
contact.desc: Information that will be displayed to customers on the contact page.

payments.title: Payment Gateways
payments.desc: Enable or disable payment methods available to customers.
payments.bankTransferDesc: Display bank account details to the customer.

taxes.title: Taxes & Fees
taxes.includeInPriceDesc: If enabled, entered product prices will be treated as tax-inclusive.

notifications.title: Notification Settings
notifications.comingSoonDesc: Notification settings are being integrated with the global communication system.

advanced.title: Advanced System Options
advanced.desc: Performance settings, maintenance mode, and debugging.
advanced.maintenanceDesc: Temporarily stop the store for updates.

errors.fetchMessage: Failed to fetch settings from server.
